---
title: "Class 12 Lab Session"
author: "Matthew Huang"
date: "2026-02-16"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Section 1. Proportion og G/G in a population

Downloaded a CSV file from Ensemble 

Here we read this CSV files 

```{r}
mxl <- read.csv("Sample Genotypes rs8069176 Homo sapiens.csv")
head(mxl)
```

```{r}
table(mxl$Genotype..forward.strand.) / nrow(mxl) * 100
```

Now let's take a look at a different population. I picked the GBR. 
```{r}
gbr <- read.csv("Sample Genotypes rs8069176 Homo sapiens.csv")
```

Find proportion of G|G

```{r}
table(gbr$Genotype..forward.strand.) / nrow(gbr) * 100
```


This variant associated with childhood asthma is more frequent in
